subcodes.first_line: O Badí'! Again and again hath Thy call been heard by Us. No cry ascendeth but He heareth it, and no deed is wrought but He beholdeth it [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بدیع ندایت مکرر باصغا فائز ما من ندآء الا و یسمعه و ما من عمل الا و یراه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @authentication; disposition of the Sacred Writings, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @power of prayer
